title: Hoarder House Clean St Just, Cornwall
description:
St Just is one of Cornwall's most characterful towns — a former mining community perched on the far western tip of the peninsula, full of granite cottages and strong community spirit. This property told a different story: years of severe hoarding had left every room in a state of significant neglect, with heavy mould growth, decades of accumulated debris and a bathroom, kitchen and staircase that had become completely unliveable.

Our team carried out a full hoarder house clean at this St Just property, working room by room through the build-up to clear, clean and restore the space. The bathroom — caked in grime with a heavily soiled bath, toilet and sink — was one of the most striking transformations of the job. What had been unusable is now clean and functional again.

Other rooms told the same story. A bedroom coated floor-to-ceiling in black mould, a kitchen covered in filth with rubbish scattered across the floor, a damp and decaying staircase — all cleared and brought back to a habitable standard. The property's character was there throughout: original floorboards, granite stone walls, timber joinery and a beautiful arched window that had been hidden beneath years of neglect.

Hoarder cleans require sensitivity, practicality and the right team. We approach every job without judgement, working efficiently to clear the property while making sure everything is disposed of responsibly — salvageable items separated for donation or reuse, waste taken to a licensed facility.

📞 **If you're dealing with a hoarder clean, estate clearance or severely neglected property in Cornwall, contact us for a free, confidential quote.** We cover St Just, Penzance, Land's End, St Ives, and the whole of West Cornwall. No job is too large or too challenging — we've seen it all.
